productDisplayName: Nike Men As Arsenal Co Navy Blue T-Shirts
description: Composition Arsenal crew neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline, graphic print with metallic tints on the chest and Arsenal badge printed on left sleeve Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Wear the Arsenal football Club men's Soccer t-shirt like a badge of honour. A signature team design that remixes iconic Gunners' graphic to create an intimidating icon, this Arsenal T-Shirt is a must-have for fans and players alike.
